observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the exact projection:installation identity can be replayed for every current maintained skill root
observed_failure.observed_result: Storyline compiled 62 installable files under skills/storyline-design, but the replay mapper stripped only .agents/skills/storyline-design and searched for a duplicated skills/storyline-design subtree beneath the canonical skill root

generalized_repair.rule: Compile and hash one exact repository-relative member_root_path, strip only that declared root during replay, and block every projected path outside it before copy or activation.
generalized_repair.openspec_scenario: A public repository nested skills root replays member-relative paths while a different skill id blocks.
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: The repair does not search parent directories, infer layouts from skill ids, accept absolute paths, or add a legacy compatibility route.

required_revalidation: Storyline installation identity replay and formal supervisor rerun
one portfolio-level final full validation after all governed sources freeze

revalidation_evidence.nested_root_regressions: current nested root, repository-root projection, and outside-root rejection passed
revalidation_evidence.compiler_and_target_installation_tests: 57 cases: 56 passed and one explicit Windows directory-symlink permission skip

claim_boundary: The repair covers exact current skill-root path projection and wrong-skill containment. It does not prove a generic target activation transaction, the final full parent, publication, or future AI behavior.
